description: Schema-driven planner registry with capability scoring. Runtime plans from tool/capability schemas using semantic similarity instead of hardcoded keyword routing.

planning_strategy.description: Planner chooses tools by comparing request lexical signals with tool/capability descriptions. Runtime code must not contain business entity keyword routes.
steps: Load tool schema and capability schema.
Compute generic semantic score from request text to tool/capability descriptions.
Prefer safe context tools before model.generate.
Use restricted tools only if the planner explicitly asks and approval policy allows.
constraints: No natural language date parser in runtime code.
Fallback must be based on schema coverage, not concrete keywords.

tools.name: time.now
tools.description: Return current local date and time from the host machine.

tools.name: time.date_math
tools.description: Calculate relative dates when the planner has already resolved the offset.

request_shapes: asks for relative date calculation after offset has been resolved

tools.name: repo_memory.search
tools.description: Search local repository memory, brain assets, starred repository summaries, and project knowledge.

tools.name: capability.match
tools.description: Match user request against registered platform capabilities.

tools.name: web.search
tools.description: Search the public web when local memory is insufficient and network access is allowed.

tools.name: weather.query
tools.description: Query weather through provider geocoding. The planner must provide a location, not runtime keyword parsing.

request_shapes: asks for weather or forecast and planner can resolve location

tools.name: model.generate
tools.description: Generate natural language response using configured local model through model gateway.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.description: Read files inside an allowed sandbox or approved workspace.

request_shapes: asks to read or write local files inside workspace

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.description: Write files only after approval and sandbox validation.

request_shapes: asks to read or write local files inside workspace

tools.name: shell.exec
tools.description: Execute shell commands only after approval and sandbox validation.

request_shapes: asks to run command or execute development task

tools.name: builtin.code_agent_core.execute
tools.description: Execute owned code agent core adapter for workspace inspection, patch planning and build/test repair loop.

request_shapes: asks to inspect code or workspace files
asks to plan a patch or diff
asks to run tests or repair a build

tools.name: builtin.memory_rag_core.execute
tools.description: Execute owned memory/RAG core adapter for local project memory retrieval, evidence normalization and summary.

request_shapes: asks about project memory, repository assets, local knowledge, RAG, evidence or stored documents
asks about own warehouse resources, brain assets, project knowledge

tools.name: builtin.browser_operator.execute
tools.description: Execute owned browser operator adapter for browser/research planning, optional web search, finding extraction and citations.

request_shapes: asks for browser automation, web research, public information search, evidence collection or citation-backed findings
asks to research a topic online, find sources, or browse web content

capabilities.description: Open-ended conversation, summarization, explanation, rewriting, and natural language response.
Answer questions about this local AI platform, codebase, repo assets, architecture, services, and reports.
Search repository memory and seeded brain asset summaries.
Requires external web search or fresh online information.
Relative date calculation after planner resolves offset.
Current weather or forecast for a planner-provided location.
Code, shell, filesystem, build, test, and repository operations.
